productDisplayName: Manchester United Men Solid Navy Blue Cap
description: Created using 100% cotton fabric, this cap from manchester united is a perfect blend of comfort and style, making it a great addition to your sporty wardrobe. Crown made of cotton fabric with embroidered eyelets to offer breathable comfort Curved visor with embroidered brand badge on the front and stitch detailing on the visor Red embroidery on the visor and on the right side Brand logo printed on the left side Adjustable back clasp for a customised Fit Cap care Hand wash in cold water Do not tumble dry or dry clean
